economic_notes: Government business enterprises include John W. Jamer Ltd., Tribal ReLeaf, and Wocawson Energy LP accounted for by modified equity method. Tobique High Stakes V.T. and Tobique Truck Stop (710331 N.B. Inc.) are consolidated entities.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to inability to obtain adequate evidence over opening balance sheet accounts for Tribal ReLeaf (a controlled business enterprise) as no prior audit or review was conducted. Prior period (2020) figures have been restated per Note 18 due to a prior period adjustment of $468,698 affecting opening net debt. Line of credit of $14,874,551 is significant. Total liabilities exceed financial assets resulting in net debt of $23,464,093. Expenses_enterprises calculated as sum of Maliseet Gas Bar Ltd. ($3,986,411) + Tobique High Stakes V.T. ($5,428,282) + Tobique Truck Stop ($1,857,825) + Own source ($9,120,925) minus own source shown separately; enterprises line here represents gas bar + high stakes + truck stop = $11,272,518 but own source included separately. Remuneration schedule referenced pages 26-27 but not visible in provided images.
